title: MÚLAFOSSUR WATERFALL | Faroe Islands by Drone in 4K - DJI Mavic Air 2
creator: eCKsplorer
notes: DRAFT CANDIDATE -- produced in a cloud (Cowork) session while the bridge to the user's local machine was intermittently down; not cross-checked against the live exemplars directory for duplicates, not yet written into the repo. Sourced to fill the Faroe Islands gap flagged during this project's own reference-pack review (no Faroe Islands exemplar found among ~45-49 existing records as of 2026-07-20). Mulafossur is the single most-photographed/most-droned Faroe Islands landmark (the waterfall falling directly into the sea below Gasadalur village), so this candidate anchors the location's single most recognizable shot. Verified this session via WebFetch of the YouTube oEmbed endpoint (https://www.youtube.com/oembed?url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oEW6_JBS97o&format=json), which returned title='MÚLAFOSSUR WATERFALL | Faroe Islands by Drone in 4K - DJI Mavic Air 2', author_name='eCKsplorer', author_url='https://www.youtube.com/@eCKsplorer', provider_name='YouTube' -- confirms a real, currently-public video with this exact title/creator, and the title itself discloses the drone model (DJI Mavic Air 2, a consumer-tier drone, not a cinema-grade platform -- factored into the scores below). The watch-page fetch (for CC-license/upload-date/duration/description) returned HTTP 429 (rate-limited) this session, same as the other three candidates in this batch; not retried further or worked around, so `license_category` is the conservative all-rights-reserved default on absence of a positive CC finding, not a directly confirmed one -- re-check when reachable. A WebSearch this session ('eCKsplorer youtube drone channel subscribers') did not surface an exact subscriber count, but did surface: inclusion in a curated 'Drone YouTubers You Must Follow' list (videos.feedspot.com) and the channel's own dedicated website with a video gallery (ecksplorer.com/video-gallery) -- both real, if imprecise, legitimacy/reach signals above an entirely unvetted personal upload, though weaker than a directly-confirmed follower count. `award_or_showcase_provenance` is left null: no contest/broadcaster/festival attribution found in this session's research. `scores` are `scores_provenance: manually_estimated`, calibrated near this pack's 'reputable curator/creator repost' tier (drone-racing-league-waterfall-fpv-dive.json's 0.76/0.74, also itself a waterfall-subject FPV piece) rather than its contest-verified top tier (skypixel11_africa_unseen's 0.8/0.8) or its broadcaster tier (bbc-earth-aerial.json's 0.78/0.75/0.80) -- reflecting a real, moderately-well-regarded dedicated drone channel shooting on consumer-tier hardware. `composite_score` is not a call to the repo's real `compute_composite_score` (no shell access to the user's environment this session); it was computed via an equivalent equal-weighted-mean formula run in this session's own Python: (0.75+0.74+0.77)/3 = 0.7533333333333333, rounded to 0.7533. `composition` stays null.

editorial_style.pacing_notes: Not independently reviewed via playback this session. 'long-form-cinematic' is inferred from the title convention (a landscape-oriented, single-landmark '4K' YouTube upload, not a /shorts/ URL) rather than an actual viewing -- correct if a live-playback review finds otherwise.
